NEPT CPP Reference
Victoria · 2026 Edition

This app is an independent clinical reference tool based on the Non-Emergency Patient Transport Clinical Practice Protocols 2026 published by the Victorian Department of Health.

This app is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or formally associated with Ambulance Victoria, the Victorian Department of Health, or any NEPT provider.

Content is provided for reference purposes only. Always apply clinical judgement and follow your NEPT provider's policies and clinical oversight framework. If in doubt, escalate per CPP006.

The developer accepts no liability for clinical decisions made using this app. It is the responsibility of the clinician to verify all information against the current published protocols.
